common.heroDesc: Pick language, convention (naming + ESLint + Prettier), and AI tool. Skip any step to use defaults.
common.howStep1: Choose a preset template or customize step by step
common.howStep2: Select language, convention (naming + lint/format), and your AI coding tool
common.howStep3: Get a rules file (.cursorrules, CLAUDE.md, etc.) tailored to your choices
common.howStep4: Place the file in your project root — your AI assistant will follow it
common.templateDesc: Pick a ready-made stack and get rules instantly.
common.customizeDesc: Choose language, convention, and AI tool step by step.
common.stepConventionDesc: Naming (camel/snake/pascal/kebab), ESLint and Prettier required or not. Skip to follow project defaults.
common.stepIDEDesc: Cursor, Claude, Windsurf, Copilot… Skip for Cursor.
common.installNpxDescVi: Nhanh — tự đặt file vào project
common.manualDescVi: Copy và dán file đã tạo
common.templateChooseDesc: Choose a preset — rules will be generated for this stack.
common.templateChooseDescVi: Chọn template — rules sẽ được tạo theo stack đó.
common.rulesMustESLintVi: Rules bắt buộc theo ESLint project
common.rulesMustPrettierVi: Rules bắt buộc theo Prettier project
common.stepFrameworkDesc: Pick frameworks and libraries for your language. You can select multiple. Skip to omit.
